title: Gossypiospermum eriophorum
taxonomy: Gossypiospermum eriophorum is classified as a genus within the family Achariaceae, a family of flowering plants. The species is native to tropical Africa and is characterized by its small, white flowers and unique seed characteristics. As a member of the Achariaceae family, Gossypiospermum eriophorum is closely related to other plants within this family, including the genera Acharia and Margaritonia. The classification of Gossypiospermum eriophorum reflects its distinct characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and taxonomic position of Gossypiospermum eriophorum within the plant kingdom.
